meaning: n.索具装配人,机身装配员,暗中操纵者
examples: Currently, she is the only existing three decked square rigger.
The information you will find in this course will help you whether you are a game rigger of a feature film rigger.
Briyton Knotts has three children and thinks he may soon lose his job as a rigger.
With the returning officers on his side, the rigger's job is mostly complete.
